hypotheses.title: Qwen3-1.7B model upgrade (from 0.6B default)
hypotheses.notes: WER improved from 4.70% to 3.91% (+0.79pp). RTF went from 0.049 to 0.130 (2.6x slower but still well under 0.5 target). Clear win for accuracy with acceptable latency tradeoff.

hypotheses.title: Lower diarization similarity threshold (0.35 → 0.25)
hypotheses.notes: Lowering MATCH_THRESHOLD to 0.20 and NEW_SPEAKER_THRESHOLD to 0.15 caused only 2 speakers to be detected (was 3). Everything merged into one cluster. Reverted.

hypotheses.title: Increase HMM self-transition (0.99 → 0.995)
hypotheses.notes: Not tested directly — focus shifted to offline pipeline. May help online mode.

hypotheses.title: Offline diarization pipeline with segmentation + AHC clustering
hypotheses.notes: NEW HYPOTHESIS (replaced spectral re-clustering). Added diarize_offline() method using pyannote segmentation + speaker embedding extraction + AHC clustering. DER improved from 68.8% to 42.2% (-26.6pp). Key: overlap-aware segmentation detects multiple simultaneous speakers.

hypotheses.title: Disable VAD gating for diarization eval
hypotheses.notes: Disabling VAD gating reduced DER from 68.8% to 60.6% by itself. Combined with offline pipeline for further gains.

hypotheses.title: Reduce _MIN_SPEECH_SAMPLES from 1.5s to 0.5s
hypotheses.notes: Lowered from 24000 to 8000 samples. Allows shorter speech segments to be processed. Also lowered _SCD_MIN_SAMPLES from 3.0s to 1.5s.

hypotheses.title: Chunk size optimization for offline pipeline (5s → 7s)
hypotheses.notes: Swept chunk sizes from 3-15s. 7.0s with 50% overlap gave best DER (42.2%). Smaller chunks over-segment, larger chunks under-segment.

hypotheses.title: AHC clustering threshold tuning (0.50 → 0.52)
hypotheses.notes: Swept AHC threshold from 0.30-0.70. Best at 0.52: DER 42.2% (confusion 6.7%, FA 0.9%). Higher thresholds merge too aggressively, lower create too many speakers.

hypotheses.title: Constrained AHC (cannot-link same-chunk speakers)
hypotheses.notes: Implemented constrained clustering where speakers from the same chunk can't merge. Did not improve over unconstrained AHC (55.7% vs 47.1%). Constraint too aggressive with overlapping chunks.

hypotheses.title: Lower segmentation activation threshold (0.5 → 0.3)
hypotheses.notes: Reduced miss rate from 34.9% to 23.2% but increased confusion to 23.9% and FA to 15.9%. Net DER increased to 63%. The lower threshold includes too many noisy frames.
